creator: rpk-clan@arcor.de
text:
After updating from FreeBSD 7.2 to 8.0-rc1 hald uses nearly 100% of the CPU. Rebuilt of hal and libusb didn't help to solve the problem. 
 
hal started in non daemon and verbose mode displayed no unserious messages.

The portstree is up to date.

How-To-Repeat: build hal and start it as daemon or /usr/local/sbin/hald --daemon=no --verbose=yes
